title: Calappa procopiana
taxonomy: Calappa procopiana belongs to the family Calappidae within the order Decapoda. It is a species of crab, classified under the genus Calappa. The classification of Calappa procopiana reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history. The species is a part of the phylum Arthropoda, which comprises a diverse group of invertebrate animals. Its classification also places it within the kingdom Animalia, indicating its multicellular and eukaryotic nature.
